speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe someone you admire

bullets: and explain why you admire them

speaking.sampleAnswer: I admire a teacher who has helped many students. She is a person who works very hard every day. I admire her because she always cares about her students' future.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a place that is special to you

cueCard.topic: Describe a place that is special to you.
bullets: and explain why it is special to you

speaking.sampleAnswer: This is the café where I first met my best friend. I remember the day when we started talking about our dreams. It is special to me because it is the place where our friendship began.
